questions: What is the patient's exact age in years?
Does the patient have signs of DHF (positive tourniquet test, petechiae/purpura/ecchymosis, mucosal bleeding, haematemesis/melena, thrombocytopenia ≤ 100,000 cells/mm³, plasma leakage)? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have signs of circulatory failure (shock)? (Yes/No)
Is the patient vomiting persistently or refusing to feed? (Yes/No)
Are the patient's vital signs unstable? (Yes/No)
Does the patient have haemorrhagic tendencies (bleeding) AND thrombocytopenia? (Yes/No)
What is the patient's weight in kg?
